allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('OK' if d.get\('token'\) else 'FALLO: '+str\(d\)\)")

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/reporte-pdf -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'Authorization: Bearer __CMDSUB_OUTPUT__' -d '{"tipo":"diario","generadoPor":"Maria Coordinadora"}' -o ~/Desktop/CACCO_nuevo.pdf -w '%{http_code}')
